project_type: Next.js 16 web app with React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui
test_framework: No test files present - validation through typecheck and build
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run typecheck (must pass with zero errors). 2. Run npm run build (must complete successfully). 3. Verify no inline style={{}} patterns remain for things that should be CSS classes.
setup_instructions: cd /projects/sandbox/OSAI/osai-web && npm install (already done - node_modules present)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node.js v22. No test suite to run - just typecheck + build.
contribution_requirements: Stay on feat/framer-design-ask-page branch. Commit all changes locally. Do not push.
key_patterns: Design system in globals.css using CSS custom properties (--bg, --text-primary, etc). Component classes (.card, .btn, .stat-card, .badge). Inline styles are prevalent and need to be replaced with CSS classes. DESIGN.md specifies rounded.xl = 20px for cards. Pages use 'use client' directive. Lucide-react for icons.
directory_structure: osai-web/app/ contains route pages. osai-web/components/ has shared components (sidebar, app-shell, ui/). osai-web/lib/ has utilities, API client, demo data. osai-web/app/globals.css is the main design system (~1910 lines).
